A

AbstractBase - Class in org.flossware.commons
An abstract base class that can be used to conveniently extends to get common functionality (for example a logger).
AbstractBase() - Constructor for class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Default constructor.
AbstractStringifiable - Class in org.flossware.commons
Default abstract base class of stringifiables.
AbstractStringifiable() - Constructor for class org.flossware.commons.AbstractStringifiable
Default constructor.
appendLine(StringBuilder, String...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractStringifiable
Appends a line to the StringBuilder by concatenating all line parts and adding a line separator.
ArrayUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
Array utility class.
asProtocolAndHost(URL) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.UrlUtil
Extract protocol and host from a URL.
asUrlEncoded(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
URL encodes a string using UTF-8 encoding.

C

ClassUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
Utility class for class functionality.
close(Closeable) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.IOUtils
Attempts to close a closeable.
closeQuietly(Closeable) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.IOUtils
Attempts to close a closeable quietly.
CommonsIOException - Exception in org.flossware.commons.io
Unchecked exception wrapper for IO-related failures.
CommonsIOException() - Constructor for exception org.flossware.commons.io.CommonsIOException
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
since 1.32 - no production usage, provide message or cause instead
CommonsIOException(String) - Constructor for exception org.flossware.commons.io.CommonsIOException
Sets the message.
CommonsIOException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception org.flossware.commons.io.CommonsIOException
Sets the cause of why self is raised and a message about it.
CommonsIOException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception org.flossware.commons.io.CommonsIOException
Sets the cause of why self is being raised.
computeHostUrl(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.UrlUtil
Using rawUrl, convert to protocol and host version.
computeHostUrlAsString(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.UrlUtil
Taking the rawURL, will return the URL for just the server.
computeQName(Service) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.SoapUtil
Computes the QName from a Service instance.
computeQName(WebServiceClient) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.SoapUtil
Computes the QName from a WebServiceClient annotation.
computeQName(Class<? extends Service>) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.SoapUtil
Computes the QName from a Service class.
concat(Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Concat objects together and return the toString of the concatenation.
concat(StringBuilder, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Concat objects together in stringBuilder using the toString of the objs.

Concat objects together and return the toString of the concatenation.
concatWithSeparator(StringBuilder, boolean, String, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Concat objects together in stringBuilder using the toString of the objs.
concatWithSeparator(StringBuilder, String, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Concat objects together in stringBuilder using the toString of the objs.
concatWithSeparator(String, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Concat objects together and return the toString of the concatenation.
createUrl(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.UrlUtil

ensureFileExists(File) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use FileUtil.requireExists(Path) instead for modern NIO.2 API
ensureFileExists(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use FileUtil.requireExists(String) instead for modern NIO.2 API
ensureString(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use StringUtil.requireNonBlank(String) instead
ensureString(String, String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use StringUtil.requireNonBlank(String, String) instead
equals(Object) - Method in record class org.flossware.commons.soap.SoapRecord

FileException - Exception in org.flossware.commons.io
Raised if any problems arise dealing with a file.

Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
since 1.32 - no production usage, provide message or cause instead

Sets the message.
FileException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception org.flossware.commons.io.FileException

Sets the cause of why self is being raised.
FileUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
A file utility class supporting both legacy java.io.File and modern java.nio.file.Path APIs.
findAnnotationOnMethods(Class<?>, Class<T>) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.MethodUtil
Finds the first annotation of a specific type on any public method in a class.
findAnnotationOnMethods(Class<?>, T) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.MethodUtil
Finds the first annotation matching the given annotation instance on any public method in a class.
findMethodsForAnnotation(Class<?>, Annotation) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.MethodUtil
Finds all public methods in a class that are annotated with a specific annotation.
findMethodsForAnnotationClass(Class<?>, Class<? extends Annotation>) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.MethodUtil
Finds all public methods in a class that are annotated with a specific annotation class.
fromCompressedString(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use JSON libraries (Jackson, Gson) for safer deserialization. This method has critical security vulnerabilities. Scheduled for removal in version 2.0.
fromFile(File) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
Load properties from a file.
fromFile(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
Load properties from a file specified by path.
fromInputStream(InputStream) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
Load properties from an input stream without closing it.
fromInputStream(InputStream, boolean) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
Load properties from an input stream.
fromReader(Reader) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
Load properties from a reader without closing it.
fromReader(Reader, boolean) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
Load properties from a reader.
fromResource(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.PropertyUtil
Load properties from a classpath resource.

generateUniqueString() - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Generate a unique string.

Generate a unique string with prefix as the prefix.
generateUniqueString(String, String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Generates a unique string with the string's prefix being prefix and suffix being suffix.

log(Level, String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
log(Level, Throwable, String) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
log(Level, Throwable, String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
log(Logger, Level, String, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.LoggerUtil
Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
log(Logger, Level, Throwable, String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.LoggerUtil
Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
log(Logger, Level, Throwable, String, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.LoggerUtil
Performs a log using the format arguments objs as an array that can be presented to the logger.
logAndReturn(Level, String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Log and return the value at found as the 0th index in the format arguments objs.
logAndReturn(Level, String, V) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Log and return the value.
logAndReturn(Logger, Level, String, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.LoggerUtil
Log and return the value at found as the 0th index in the format arguments objs.
logAndReturn(Logger, Level, String, V) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.LoggerUtil
Log and return the value.
logAndReturnByIndex(Level, String, int, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Log and return the value that are found at index in the format arguments objs.
logAndReturnByIndex(Logger, Level, String, int, Object...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.LoggerUtil
Log and return the value that are found at index in the format arguments objs.
logError(String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Convenience method to log at SEVERE level.
logError(Throwable, String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Convenience method to log at SEVERE level with a throwable.
LoggerUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
A logger utility class that adds the ability to log and return values as well as present a format arguments array to log vs creating an object array to log multiple things.
logInfo(String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Convenience method to log at INFO level.
logWarning(String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Convenience method to log at WARNING level.
logWarning(Throwable, String, Object...) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractBase
Convenience method to log at WARNING level with a throwable.

M

MethodUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
Same vein as java.util.Collections

N

newInputStream(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Return an input stream for the given path string using NIO.2.
newInputStream(Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Return an input stream for the given path using NIO.2 with symlink/hardlink protection.
newInputStream(Path, Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Return an input stream for the given path with path traversal validation.

O

ObjectUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
Utility class in the spirit of java.util.Objects.
org.flossware.commons - module org.flossware.commons
JCommons: Common Java utility library.
org.flossware.commons - package org.flossware.commons
Core interfaces and base classes for the commons-java library.
org.flossware.commons.io - package org.flossware.commons.io
I/O exception classes for the commons-java library.
org.flossware.commons.soap - package org.flossware.commons.soap
SOAP web service support classes.
org.flossware.commons.util - package org.flossware.commons.util
Utility classes for common Java operations.

Ensures a path represents a directory.

requireExists(Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Ensures a path exists.
requireNonBlank(String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Validates that a string is not null, empty, or whitespace-only using default error message.
requireNonBlank(String, String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Validates that a string is not null, empty, or whitespace-only.
requireReadable(Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Ensures a path is readable.
requireRegularFile(Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Ensures a path represents a regular file (not a directory).
requireWritable(Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Ensures a path is writable.

Returns the value of the service record component.

Sets a header on the SOAP service or port proxy.

Sets a header with QName on the SOAP service or port proxy.
setHeaders(T, Header...) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.SoapUtil
Sets multiple headers on the SOAP service or port proxy.
setUrl(T, String) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.SoapUtil
Sets the endpoint URL for a web service port.

since 1.32 - no production usage, provide message or cause instead

Sets the message.

Sets the cause of why self is raised and a message about it.
SoapException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception org.flossware.commons.util.SoapException
Sets the cause of why self is being raised.

Compact constructor that validates parameters.
SoapUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
Utility class for Apache CXF SOAP service operations.
STRING_CANNOT_BE_BLANK - Static variable in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Default error message for blank string validation.
Stringifiable - Interface in org.flossware.commons
API to convert an object to a StringBuilder and makes it pretty.
StringUtil - Class in org.flossware.commons.util
Same vein as java.util.Objects

T

toCompressedString(Serializable) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.StringUtil
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use JSON libraries (Jackson, Gson) for safer serialization. This method relies on Java native serialization which has known security vulnerabilities. Scheduled for removal in version 2.0.

Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use JSON libraries (Jackson, Gson) for safer serialization. This method relies on Java native serialization which has known security vulnerabilities. Scheduled for removal in version 2.0.
toStringBuilder(String) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractStringifiable
Using prefix return the string representation of self.
toStringBuilder(String) - Method in interface org.flossware.commons.Stringifiable
Using prefix return the string representation of self.
toStringBuilder(StringBuilder) - Method in class org.flossware.commons.AbstractStringifiable
Using stringBuilder, compute the string representation of self.
toStringBuilder(StringBuilder) - Method in interface org.flossware.commons.Stringifiable
Using stringBuilder, compute the string representation of self.
toStringBuilder(StringBuilder, String) - Method in interface org.flossware.commons.Stringifiable
Using stringBuilder, compute the string representation of self whose prefix for computation is prefix.

V

validateNoTraversalPatterns(Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Validates that a path does not contain suspicious traversal patterns.
validatePathTraversal(Path, Path) - Static method in class org.flossware.commons.util.FileUtil
Validates that a path does not escape a base directory using path traversal.
